articles.title: South Boston runner supports BMC social workers in Boston Marathon
articles.description:
Paige Beattie, 23, is running with Team BMC to raise funds for the hospital’s safety-net mission and the social workers who support patients in crisis.

The post South Boston runner supports BMC social workers in Boston Marathon appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Paige Beattie, 23, runs Boston Marathon to support BMC social workers.
Funds raised will aid BMC's safety-net mission for patients in crisis.
Local residents benefit from enhanced support services at Boston Medical Center.

articles.title: Can Kennedy lineage and hype over ‘Love Story’ help send JFK’s grandson to Congress?
articles.description:
“They don’t just like me because I’m a Kennedy. Ask them how they feel about RFK Jr.,” he said.

The post Can Kennedy lineage and hype over ‘Love Story’ help send JFK’s grandson to Congress? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: JFK's grandson, Joe Kennedy III, aims for Congress in upcoming elections.
Kennedy emphasizes individual support over family legacy, referencing RFK Jr.'s challenges.
Local voters may prioritize candidate values over lineage in the 2026 election.
